description: Checkpoint 1 Output Schema — Spine / Epicentre. Machine-checkable structural contract with embedded semantic guidance.
purpose: CP1 is the foundational checkpoint for the Lab reasoning pipeline. Every CP1-producing node must emit a JSON object satisfying all structural constraints below. Validated at runtime via system.lib.schema_validator.validate_cp1.

evidence_dictionary.constraint: Non-empty. Each entry must be a valid EvidenceUnit object.
evidence_dictionary.semantics: The curated evidence set that supports the epicentre thesis. Not a dump of all available data — only evidence that structurally contributes to the dominant force identification.

epicentre_thesis.constraint: Word count >= epicentre_thesis_min_words (see contract_config.json). Must contain only resolved [N] citations.
epicentre_thesis.semantics: The causal center-of-gravity statement for the run. NOT a broad market recap. Must define the single dominant force at T-n and its expected consequences into T. See epicentre_thesis_contract for full semantic requirements.

bifurcation_resolutions.constraint: Optional during migration. When present, each item must include bifurcation_id, selected_side, rationale, opposite_side_invalidation.
bifurcation_resolutions.semantics: Machine-checkable contradiction reconciliation map for cross_corr_v1 bifurcations.

dominant_evidence_track.semantics: Classifies the epistemic grounding of the thesis.

pre_pricing_assessment.constraint: Required if news-sourced evidence is cited.
pre_pricing_assessment.semantics: States whether the event was pre-priced by Polymarket/price action.

bifurcation_id.constraint: Non-empty ID referencing a cross_corr_v1 bifurcation block.

selected_side.constraint: Non-empty selector describing the side chosen by Decide.

rationale.constraint: Non-empty explanation for why selected_side dominates.

opposite_side_invalidation.constraint: Non-empty condition that would make the opposite side dominate.

ref_id.constraint: Positive integer >= 1, no leading zeros. Unique within payload. Ex: '[1]', '[12]'.
ref_id.semantics: Citation anchor. Every [N] appearing in epicentre_thesis must resolve to an evidence_dictionary entry with this ref_id.

ledger_id.constraint: Lane prefix (must exist in contract_config.json lane_prefix_map) + 8 uppercase hex chars. Unique within payload.
ledger_id.semantics: Deterministic identity hash. PREFIX MAP: see codex/substrate/contracts/contract_config.json lane_prefix_map. SHA8: first 8 hex chars of SHA256('{lane}|{identity_key}', UTF-8).

subject.semantics: Entity identifier. For STOCK entries: the ticker symbol (e.g. 'XLK'). For MACRO: canonical name (e.g. 'US_10Y'). Must match the identity used in the source lane.

signal_summary.semantics: Prose summary of the evidence signal. Should convey what the data point means, not just what it is.

epicentre_thesis_contract.description: Semantic contract for epicentre_thesis content. Structural validation catches format; this defines meaning.

dominant_force_statement.description: Name ONE force (not a list) as primary driver at T-n.
dominant_force_statement.prohibition: No multi-thesis outputs presented as co-equal 'main drivers'.

dominance_justification.description: Explain why this force outranks alternatives in current evidence.
dominance_justification.prohibition: No evidence dumping without selecting a dominant force.

transmission_path.description: Describe the mechanism from force -> affected lanes/assets.
transmission_path.prohibition: No prediction list detached from causal chain.

t_consequence_map.description: State expected directional consequences at horizon T.
t_consequence_map.prohibition: No hindsight phrasing in Lab CP outputs (must be from T-n perspective).

invalidation_conditions.description: State concrete conditions that would break the thesis.
invalidation_conditions.semantics: Must be falsifiable — vague hedges like 'unless conditions change' are insufficient.

epicentre_thesis_contract.completeness_rule: If any of the five components are missing, the thesis is contract-incomplete even if it passes JSON and citation validation.

citation_rules.valid_format: [N] where N is a positive integer
citation_rules.resolution_rule: Every [N] in epicentre_thesis must have a corresponding evidence_dictionary entry with ref_id == '[N]'.

error_codes.MISSING_FIELD: A required field or object key is absent or empty.
error_codes.DUPLICATE_REF_ID: Two evidence entries share the same ref_id.
error_codes.DUPLICATE_LEDGER_ID: Two evidence entries share the same ledger_id.
error_codes.INVALID_LEDGER_ID: ledger_id is malformed or uses a prefix not declared in codex/substrate/contracts/contract_config.json lane_prefix_map.
error_codes.MALFORMED_CITATION: epicentre_thesis contains a range/CSV/leading-zero citation form.
error_codes.CITATION_UNRESOLVED: A [N] citation in epicentre_thesis has no matching ref_id in evidence.
error_codes.BELOW_MIN_WORD_COUNT: epicentre_thesis word count is below the configured minimum.

lab_cross_corr_v1.boundary: Must NOT mint hypothesis slugs or interpret market meaning.

lab_orient.role: Surface candidate causal chains from cross-correlation structure. Rank candidate epicentres by explanatory power and breadth.
lab_orient.boundary: Must NOT finalize the thesis; only prepare candidate force structure.

lab_decide.role: Synthesize one dominant epicentre from ALL Phase 1 evidence. The thesis emerges from total synthesis — it is the singular gravitational point, not the winner of a hypothesis tournament.
lab_decide.output: Locks CP1: evidence_dictionary + epicentre_thesis prose (>= min_words with [N] citations).
